STATEMENT OF DECISION THE COURT AWARDS MR. NAIDU $2,184.00 FOR ECONOMIC DAMAGES, $545,000.00 FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS PLUS ATTORNEYS'S FEES AND COSTS OF SUIT. PLAINTIFF SHALL MOVE FOR EQUITABLE RELIEF WITHIN 45 DAYS OF THE FILING OF THIS STATEMENT OF DECISION OR NOTIFY THE COURT THAT THE EQUITABLE ISSUES HAVE BEEN RESOLVED. IT IS ORDERED THAT JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED FOR THE PLAINTIFF AGAINST THE DEFENDANT ON ALL COUNTS.
